name: Lo Mein > Loo
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Raw lean pork, cut into matchsticks
2 oz Raw lean beef, cut into book-cover sized pieces
2 oz Raw chicken, cut into small pieces of any shape
2 oz Raw shelled shrimp (cooked will do)
2 oz Mushrooms, sliced (button or reconstituted Chinese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the noodles and cook for 3 minutes. Drain and toss with sesame oil and regular oil. Set aside.
2. In four separate dishes, combine each meat with half a tablespoon of sherry and half a tablespoon of cornstarch.
3. Heat four tablespoons of oil in a skillet or wok over high heat. Add the meats one at a time, stirring for a few seconds between additions: pork, beef, chicken, and shrimp. Once the shrimp are added and tossed with the other ingredients, add the mushrooms and cabbage. Cook until the cabbage is wilted.
4. Add scallions, soy sauce, salt, and MSG (or chicken bouillon) to the pan. Stir well.
5. Add the noodles and bean sprouts to the pan. Stir-cook for 3 minutes.
6. Serve hot on a warm platter.
